name: Legend Eau de Parfum
short: A timeless amber eau de parfum with a refined, confident character.
description: Legend is a timeless amber eau de parfum that opens with a bright, confident burst of bergamot and pink pepper, blooms into a sophisticated heart of lavender and geranium, and settles into a warm, refined base of amber, tonka, and sandalwood. Composed at high concentration for a polished, lasting sillage. Hand-filled and finished in our Udaipur atelier. A scent for those who understand that true elegance never shouts — it simply lingers.
benefits: Timeless amber composition with lavender heart
Weighted glass flacon with brass-tone cap
usage: Spritz onto pulse points — wrists, neck, behind the ears — from a distance of 6 inches. Do not rub. Reapply as desired. A versatile signature scent for day or evening.

customerReviews.title: A Bold, Enduring Scent
customerReviews.body: APS Majeste 100 ML Eau De Parfum is a captivating fragrance that masterfully blends spicy warmth with sweet, comforting undertones. Its rich notes of exotic spices and smooth vanilla create a luxurious, masculine aroma that exudes confidence and sophistication. The long-lasting formula ensures the scent lingers for hours, making it ideal for both daytime and evening wear. Perfect for the modern man seeking a distinctive, high-quality perfume.
